mapper.select: select t.id as tagId, t.name as name, t.is_pinned as pinned, count(bt.id) as bookmarkCount from lv_tag t left join lv_bookmark_tag bt on t.id = bt.tag_id and bt.user_id = #{userId} where t.user_id = #{userId} group by t.id, t.name, t.is_pinned, t.created_at order by t.is_pinned desc, case when t.is_pinned = 1 then t.created_at end asc, case when t.is_pinned = 0 then count(bt.id) end desc, t.created_at asc, t.id asc

select t.id as tagId, t.name as name, t.is_pinned as pinned, count(bt.id) as bookmarkCount from lv_tag t left join lv_bookmark_tag bt on t.id = bt.tag_id and bt.user_id = #{userId} where t.user_id = #{userId} and t.id = #{tagId} group by t.id, t.name, t.is_pinned
mapper.insert: insert ignore into lv_bookmark_tag (bookmark_id, tag_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at) select bt.bookmark_id, #{targetTagId}, #{userId}, #{now}, #{now} from lv_bookmark_tag bt where bt.user_id = #{userId} and bt.tag_id = #{sourceTagId}
